toasts.new_orders_body: Just landed on the live board.
toasts.new_disputes_body: A diner wants a second look — respond soon.
toasts.reward_claimed_body: A diner just finished their plate.

login.title: Staff sign in
login.non_staff_error: This dashboard is for restaurant staff and admins.

forgot_password.title: Forgot your password?
forgot_password.blurb: Enter the email or phone on your staff account. We'll send a 6-digit code to both your SMS and email — enter whichever arrives first.
forgot_password.reset_blurb: Check your email and SMS. The code expires in 5 minutes. Then pick a new password.
forgot_password.code_hint: Auto-fills on most phones when the SMS lands.
forgot_password.back_to_identifier: Try a different email or phone
forgot_password.done_blurb: Signing you in — pick your restaurant next.

onboard.title: Onboard your restaurant
onboard.blurb: Set up a new restaurant in under a minute. You'll be the owner — once you finish, you can add menu items, set the reward rule, and invite staff.
onboard.age_confirm: I confirm I am 18 or older.
onboard.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Used as plateclean.in/your-slug.
onboard.error_bad_coords: Latitude and longitude must be numbers.

summary.title: Last 7 days
summary.pick_restaurant: Sign in and pick a restaurant first.

queue.title: Validation queue ({{count}})
queue.pick_restaurant: Pick a restaurant on the sign-in screen first.
queue.empty: All clear — no plates waiting on a decision.

detail.adjust_requires_score: Pick a score before submitting an adjustment.
detail.grant_reward_note: Staff manual grant — overrides vision score.
detail.send_bill_blurb: Once you've decided, email the itemised bill so the diner can pay at the counter.

orders.title: Live orders
orders.blurb: Every meal in progress at your restaurant right now. New tables show up on the left the moment a diner sends their order from the app.
orders.empty_blurb: When a diner sends an order from a table, it'll show up here — usually within a second.

walkin.empty_blurb: Orders will appear here as diners scan QRs or you tap + New order.
walkin.no_items: No items on this order yet.
walkin.void_body: This removes this order (Table {{table}}) from Live Orders. This can't be undone — if the guest wants to restart with a QR scan, they'll begin a fresh session.
walkin.step1_blurb: Tap an available table to start the order.
walkin.no_tables_hint: No dining tables yet — add tables in Settings → Tables to enable dine-in orders.
walkin.step3_blurb: Optional — most walk-ins are fine with a printed bill. Add these only if the guest asks.

takeaway.tile_subtext: No table — for pickup / to-go orders

walkin.reward_none_below_threshold: No reward — plate score {{score}}% was under the {{threshold}}% floor.
walkin.reward_none_rejected: No reward — session was rejected by staff.
walkin.reward_none_walkin: No reward — walk-in orders are not reward-eligible.

past_orders.title: Past orders
past_orders.blurb: Everything that has dropped off the live board — rewards issued, orders cancelled, and anything the diner walked away from. Resend a bill if the diner didn't get theirs.
past_orders.empty_blurb: Once orders finish or drop off the live board, they'll land here.

cancel_order.title: Cancel this order?
cancel_order.blurb: The diner will see the reason on their phone. Once cancelled, the order can't be re-opened. Use this if the kitchen can't fulfil what was ordered.
cancel_order.reason_placeholder: e.g. Kitchen ran out of paneer.
cancel_order.reason_hint: Shown to the diner. Please be honest — this is what they read on their phone.
cancel_order.err_reason_short: Give the diner at least a sentence — a bare 'cancelled' isn't fair to them.
cancel_order.err_generic: Couldn't cancel the order. Try again.

edit_items.title: Update order items
edit_items.warn_kitchen: The kitchen may already be preparing this order. Confirm with them before saving — the update replaces the entire item list.
edit_items.empty: No items yet — add at least one before saving.
edit_items.no_menu: No dishes on the menu yet.
edit_items.err_empty: An order needs at least one dish.
edit_items.err_generic: Couldn't update the order. Try again.

bill_view.title: Bill details
bill_view.no_gst: GST not applied (composition scheme / below threshold)
bill_view.receipt_no_gst_note: GST not applicable (composition scheme / below threshold)
bill_view.receipt_footer_thanks: Thank you for finishing your plate.

bug_report.title: Report a bug or issue
bug_report.blurb: Something misbehaving in the app? Tell us what happened and we'll look at it. Reports land on the platform-owner queue and you'll see status updates below as they land.
bug_report.title_placeholder: e.g. Bill total misrenders when reward code applied
bug_report.description_placeholder: Steps to reproduce, screenshots described in words, what you expected instead — anything that helps us track it down.
bug_report.description_hint: Free text — no character format required.
bug_report.err_too_short: Please give a summary of at least 4 characters and a description of at least 8.
bug_report.err_generic: Couldn't send your report. Try again.

platform.title: Platform command center
platform.blurb: Cross-restaurant scorecard for the platform owner. Hidden from staff — 404s for any non-admin session. Numbers below scope to the range you pick.
platform.bugs_empty_blurb: No bug reports in this filter. Staff can file from the Report a bug screen in their dashboard.
platform.bug_notes_placeholder: Triage notes — repro steps, PR link, workarounds, next-owner…

settings.title: Restaurant settings
settings.blurb: Configure how bills are calculated, taxed and numbered for this restaurant. Changes apply to bills issued from now on — past bills keep the rates snapshotted at issue time.
settings.gst_enabled_hint: Turn off if your restaurant is below the ₹20 lakh annual turnover threshold, or on a composition scheme. Bills will show subtotal only — no CGST/SGST split.
settings.gst_rate_hint: 5% is the standard dine-in rate. 18% applies to 5-star hotels. Leave at 0 if GST is turned off above.
settings.gstin_hint: 15-character GST identification number issued by the department. Prints on every tax invoice.
settings.bill_prefix_hint: Prepended to every bill number, e.g. SPT/2026/. Leave blank to use bill numbers alone.
settings.hsn_hint: Prints on the bill's tax line. 9963 is the default for restaurant services.
settings.err_rate_range: GST rate must be between 0 and 28%.

tables.title: Tables
tables.blurb: Manage your dining tables and their QR stickers.
tables.empty_blurb: Add your first table to enable dine-in orders. Each new table can auto-generate a QR sticker ready to print.
tables.field_code_hint: Short label like T-09. Leave blank to let the system assign the next sequential code.
tables.field_auto_qr: Generate a QR sticker for this table
tables.field_auto_qr_hint: Mints a fresh QR and binds it to this table so you can print and stick it right away.
tables.regen_body: This retires the current sticker — any customer who scans it will get an error. Print a fresh sticker before you swap it on the table.
tables.remove_body: It won't be selectable for new orders. Existing sessions on this table continue as normal. You can restore it later from Recently Removed.
tables.toast_regen_body: Print a fresh sticker before swapping it on the table.
tables.toast_restored_body: It's back in the active list.

bill_send.title: Send bill to diner
bill_send.blurb: Emails a CGST-compliant tax invoice with the itemised list, GST split, and any reward discount applied.
bill_send.sent_blurb: Should land in the diner's inbox within a minute. You can resend at any time.
bill_send.generic_error: Couldn't send the bill. Try again.
bill_send.redemption_hint: If the diner has an unredeemed bill-discount reward code, paste it here to apply the discount on this bill. Only applies on first generation — a resend won't re-price.
bill_send.resend_frozen_note: Same items, same total ({{total}}). Issued {{date}} — a resend can't re-price or re-apply a coupon.
bill_send.resend_coupon_applied: Reward {{code}} applied at issue time · already on this bill

menu_editor.title: Menu
menu_editor.empty_blurb: Scan your menu card or add dishes one at a time. Whatever's here is what diners see when they order.
menu_editor.reward_toggle_hint: Can be given as a free dish reward.
menu_editor.field_description_hint: Optional. One line the diner sees on the menu.
menu_editor.field_category_hint: How diners see it grouped on the order screen. Add new sections like "Tandoor" or "Kids menu" as needed.
menu_editor.scan_step_upload: Take a photo or upload one
menu_editor.scan_step_review_hint: Uncheck any rows that aren't right. Low-confidence rows are flagged so you check them.
menu_editor.scan_generic_error: Couldn't read that photo. Try again with a clearer shot.
menu_editor.scan_toast_added: Added {{count}} dishes from your menu card
menu_editor.scan_toast_added_plural: Added {{count}} dishes from your menu card

instruction.menu_item: Send the dish from the reward rule. Don't ring up payment for it.
instruction.bill_discount: Apply the discount amount to this customer's current bill (or note for their next visit).

qr_tokens.title: QR sticker inventory
qr_tokens.blurb: Mint fresh sticker tokens, bind them to a specific restaurant + table, or retire a damaged one. Only platform admins can act here.
qr_tokens.admin_only: Admin only. Sign in with a platform-admin account to manage QR stickers.
qr_tokens.empty_blurb: Try switching the state filter or minting a fresh batch below.
qr_tokens.mint_blurb: Each token is 10 characters, minted unassigned. Bind to a table later. Up to 500 per batch.
qr_tokens.print_sheet_hint: Opens a new tab with 6-per-A4 table-tent cards for every assigned sticker in the current filter.
qr_tokens.bind_table_hint: Short label the diner sees on the sticker, e.g. T-01, T-02.
qr_tokens.retire_blurb: Retirement is permanent. Print a fresh sticker for this table if you still need one.

qr_print.title: {{count}} sticker(s) ready to print
qr_print.empty: No assigned stickers match this filter. Bind stickers to tables first, then reload this page.
qr_print.card_cta: Scan to finish your plate and unlock a reward.
qr_print.print_hint_body: In the print dialog, enable "Background graphics" so the green panel and coloured chips print. Chrome ships with this off by default.
qr_print.step_reward: Finish your plate → unlock a reward
qr_print.reward_chip: Free dish or ₹100* off on next bill

admin.title: Onboard a restaurant
admin.admin_only_blurb: Only platform admins can onboard a new restaurant.

details.slug_hint: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens. Used in the URL: plateclean.in/{slug}.
details.gst_hint: Optional now — you can add or edit any time.
details.bill_prefix_hint: Prepended to every bill number, e.g. SPT/2026/

menu.blurb: We pre-filled a starter menu. Adjust the names, prices (in minor units, e.g. paise), and categories, then add the whole list.
menu.scan_hint: Snap a photo of your printed menu — we'll read the dishes and prices in about 8 seconds.
menu.field_description_placeholder: Optional short description (e.g. slow-cooked, house special)

reward.blurb: Pick which dish counts as the "free" reward. The bill-discount option uses the same value.

staff.blurb: Invite the people who'll run the restaurant. Start with one owner (they can edit the restaurant + invite more staff later), then optionally add managers / servers now. Each invite creates a staff account with the password you set — hand the credentials over out of band.
staff.password_hint: At least 8 characters. They can change it after signing in.
staff.credentials_warning: Copy each credential to share securely. They aren't persisted in the UI after you leave this screen.

done.summary_no_staff: No staff invited yet — invite from the restaurant settings later.
done.owner_signin_pointer: Owners can sign in at /login, pick the restaurant, and start approving sessions.

staff_metrics.title: Staff metrics
staff_metrics.blurb: Weekly snapshot of each staff member's validation behaviour. Rows highlighted in red exceeded 2× the restaurant median rejection rate in that week — the alert job will fire if a staff member stays over that threshold for four weeks running (ethics rule 8).
staff_metrics.empty: No snapshots yet. The first one writes the Monday after the weekly job runs (or after a staff member completes 5+ validations in a week).
staff_metrics.pick_restaurant: Sign in and pick a restaurant first.

analytics.title: Restaurant analytics
analytics.blurb: How the restaurant has been doing over the chosen window. Numbers are scoped to this restaurant only.
analytics.pick_restaurant: Sign in and pick a restaurant first.

sustainability.heading: Sustainability
sustainability.blurb: Aggregate impact from staff-approved meals in this window. We compare consumption to a typical restaurant baseline — anything above counts as food saved.
sustainability.kg_food_saved: kg food kept out of the bin

top_dishes.heading: Top dishes (by avg consumption, approved meals only)
top_dishes.empty: No approved sessions in this window yet.

fraud.heading: Fraud signals
fraud.empty: No fraud signals in this window.

pdf.download_hint: One-page sustainability summary for the current range

reward_rules_settings.no_rules: No reward rule set for this restaurant yet.
reward_rules_settings.value_helper_menu: Leave blank to use the menu item's price (₹{{price}} for {{name}}). Set a specific rupee value to override — applies to rewards issued after this change; existing reward codes keep their original value.
reward_rules_settings.value_helper_none: Leave blank to use the linked menu item's price. Set a specific rupee value to override.

rewards_screen.title: Rewards
rewards_screen.blurb: Track what's been issued, redeemed, or voided at your restaurant.
rewards_screen.pick_restaurant: Sign in and pick a restaurant first.
rewards_screen.sparkline_alt: Rewards issued per day, last 14 days

rewards.code_masked_hint: Diner has this code — shows here once they use it.

disputes.blurb: Diners who think a rejection or score was wrong end up here. Resolve in their favour to flag the case for the team to learn from; resolve in the restaurant's favour to close it; pick "closed" if the issue is unrelated.
disputes.empty_open: No open disputes — nothing to review.

detail.title: Dispute · table {{code}}
detail.no_validation: No staff decision recorded for this session.
detail.no_captures: Capture images have been purged (retention policy).

not_on_staff.heading: You're not on the staff of this restaurant
not_on_staff.body: Ask the restaurant owner to add you to the staff list, then sign back in. If this is your restaurant, contact hello@plateclean.in and we'll help sort it out.
not_on_staff.support_body:
Hi Plate-Clean team,

I'm getting a "not on staff" error when signing in to the dashboard. Can you help?

Thanks,
not_on_staff.support_body_with_context:
Hi Plate-Clean team,

I'm getting a "not on staff" error when trying to access restaurant: {{context}}. Can you help?

Thanks,

notes.label: Note for the kitchen
notes.placeholder: e.g. less sugar, warm please, no onions
notes.has_notes_aria: This order has notes for the kitchen
